Best regards,
Sagar K S
PluginHive

comments.body:
Hi Odin,

Thank you for granting the access.

Upon checking, I can see that after migrating to the FedEx REST API, you are getting a discounted FedEx One Rate.

Could you please confirm if you would prefer the FedEx One Rate to be shown, or your account-specific rates at checkout?

You may also verify this on the FedEx website by checking the One Rate section. Please refer to the attached screenshot.

Please let us know your preference so we can assist you accordingly.

Looking forward to your response.


 ![](https://pluginhive.zendesk.com/attachments/token/R7fUHZ0FAunDp8ZMk761ATY2q/?name=Screenshot+2026-04-07+at+4.25.33%E2%80%AFPM.png)
Best regards,
Priyanka
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hi Odin,
 
Thank you for granting the access.
 
Upon checking, I can see that after migrating to the FedEx REST API, you are getting a discounted FedEx One Rate. 
 
Could you please confirm if you would prefer the FedEx One Rate to be shown, or your account-specific rates at checkout?

Looking forward to your response.

comments.body:
Customer states that after migrating to FedEx REST the rates are not matching up.

Checks done:
Customer has 2 shipping profile

1. For General profile, no handling fees is added via shoipify.
2. For Custom profile 80% handling fees is added.

Customer has shared multiple screenshots.

Customer has shared a screenshot with following details
**Request Id :4c3449d1dcd1a59b8fb545cfb33af340 (shared by customer)**

**Request Id :9a8e90e9c43eaf9d832273ad6b18a84c (checked by team)**


Product : Subaru JDM Spec C Nitrited EJ207 Crankshaft 75mm Stroke
Box packaging : 24lbs, 18*18*8

Upon comparing the fedex rate screenshot that customer sent and request-response :

- Residential is passed as true in the app  whereas in fedex it is not ticked that it's a residential address
- One rate is being passed in the response in the app

I discussed this with team and keerthi and replying to customer
Moving on hold
comments.html_body:
Customer states that after migrating to FedEx REST the rates are not matching up.

Customer has 2 shipping profile 
  1. For General profile, no handling fees is added via shoipify.
  2. For Custom profile 80% handling fees is added.

Product : Subaru JDM Spec C Nitrited EJ207 Crankshaft 75mm Stroke

Upon comparing the fedex rate screenshot that customer sent and request-response :

  • One rate is being passed in the response in the app
 
I discussed this with team and keerthi and replying to customer

comments.body:
L3: https://pluginhive.slack.com/archives/C02E15X8X0C/p1775621858691379

MCSL customer has been using our app for rates since 21-03-2023 and has recently migrated to the FedEx REST API.
The customer has both negotiated rates and One Rate enabled in their FedEx account. However, post-migration, the One Rate toggle is no longer available, and One Rate is being applied by default at checkout.

The customer has configured custom boxes, we are passing as custom boxes in request but in the response log , It is being Identified as FedEx Boxes and One Rate is being applied as special services.

The customer does not want One Rate to be used and prefers only negotiated rates to be displayed.

Kindly assist in preventing One Rate from being applied in this case.

Store details:
Store URL: outfront-motorsports.myshopify.com
Ac ID: 10b778be-03ce-40ce-b169-ff2d5709b251
Plan: $9 Starter
Orders : 41

L3: https://pluginhive.slack.com/archives/C02E15X8X0C/p1775621858691379
 
MCSL customer has been using our app for rates since 21-03-2023 and has recently migrated to the FedEx REST API.
The customer has both negotiated rates and One Rate enabled in their FedEx account. However, post-migration, the One Rate toggle is no longer available, and One Rate is being applied by default at checkout.
 
The customer has configured custom boxes, we are passing as custom boxes in request but in the response log , It is being Identified as FedEx Boxes and One Rate is being applied as special services. 
 
The customer does not want One Rate to be used and prefers only negotiated rates to be displayed.

Kindly assist in preventing One Rate from being applied in this case.
